div.font:
③ gRPC / REST call
Authorization: Bearer {token}

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(84, 130, 53), rgb(112, 152, 85)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(84, 130, 53), rgb(112, 152, 85));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 1306px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #548235; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#548235, #709855); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 442px; margin-left: 1065px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
特徴:
- ユーザー介在なし (M2M)
- client_secret は Vault で管理
- refresh_token なし
- トークン寿命: 5分（短命）
- Service B が JWT を検証

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 442px; margin-left: 1335px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Service B の JWT 検証:
1. JWKS エンドポイントから公開鍵取得
2. signature 検証
3. exp / iss / aud クレーム検証
4. scope / role 確認

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 690px; margin-left: 784px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.font: 比較: PKCE=ユーザー操作あり・最も安全 | Device Grant=入力制限デバイス向け | Client Credentials=サーバー間・最もシンプル

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
